name: 碾壓型——實力降維打擊
description: 以絕對實力差距讓對方的威脅變成笑話。語氣平淡甚至帶笑，越輕描淡寫越顯示實力差距。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: Unfortunately, Mr. Gallow, you don't have the authority to kick me out. You could buy Barlay Studios, but your measly $300 million just isn't going to cut it. And from what I understand, you're pretty deep in debt right now. Please take me to my car. I don't want to waste any more time on irrelevant people.
